lane: operator-directed (ChatGPT-scoped); opened only after CI went fully green on main (run 28338450984 all jobs success)
doctrine: A witness component should not be able to name the surface that would let it coerce the state it claims to observe. A witness that could write nq-db could manufacture the findings it is meant to be raw testimony for.

inventory.key_finding: nq-witness + nq-witness-api closures already EXCLUDE nq-db (structurally walled from NQ's persistence/findings surface). Active probes live in nq-monitor which DOES depend on nq-db -> intra-crate, not crate-separable without a refactor.

built: scripts/check-witness-boundaries.sh — reads resolved cargo dep graph (cargo tree -e normal); forbidden: nq-witness/nq-witness-api MUST NOT have nq-db; control: nq-monitor MUST have nq-db (graph-reader tripwire); self-test: synthetic nq-witness->nq-db MUST be flagged. All fail-closed, true exit codes.
docs/working/decisions/WITNESS_PROBE_BOUNDARY.md (doctrine, allowed exceptions, named intra-crate gap) + FEATURE_HISTORY entry.
allowed_exceptions_classified: Read-only system observation: `systemctl show --property=ActiveState/MainPID` (collect/services.rs), ls/cat/arp/nc -U/ICMP — observation, not coercion.

Witness writes to its OWN throwaway scratch: sqlite_health WAL probe creates a temp DB + inserts to measure checkpoint behavior — scratch instrumentation, never the observed subject's state, never nq-db.

verify.gate_pass: nq-witness ⊥ nq-db, nq-witness-api ⊥ nq-db, control nq-monitor->nq-db present, self-test flags synthetic violation
verify.end_to_end_proof: injected real nq-db dep into nq-witness/Cargo.toml -> gate exit 1; git checkout revert -> gate exit 0, tree clean

deferred_named_not_closed: Active-witness probes (crates/nq-monitor/src/*_probe.rs) are intra-nq-monitor (which depends on nq-db); build graph cannot wall intra-crate modules. Structural fix = extract an nq-probe crate excluding nq-db (architecture refactor, OUT of #6 scope, forcing-case-gated). Today held by probes' read-only/receipt-only design + review (testimony-typed), not structural.
scope_guard: Did NOT refactor crate architecture, rename doctrine surfaces, change runtime behavior, or turn this into a lint/style pass. Enforced the cleanly-enforceable crate boundary; named the intra-crate gap honestly.
acceptance: Packet #6 core DONE (passive-witness/publisher crate boundary structurally enforced + CI-wired + proven fail-closed). Active-probe intra-crate boundary named as deferred structural gap. Loop returns to AUDIT/idle. Sequence remainder: #7 external/off-LAN gateway-path vantage, #8 pfSense PHP comparator, #9 Kea, #10 TLS 2d-b.
